roadmap.day-001-ai-engineering-overview..title: AI Engineering Roadmap
roadmap.day-001-ai-engineering-overview..description: Introduction to AI Engineering, understanding the modern AI ecosystem, selecting a technology stack, and preparing the development environment for the upcoming 100-day learning roadmap.

roadmap.day-002-llms-and-provider-landsc.title: Large Language Models & Provider Landscape
roadmap.day-002-llms-and-provider-landsc.description: Learn what Large Language Models are, how they work at a high level, compare major AI providers, understand tokens and context windows, and choose the right model for different use cases.

roadmap.day-003-prompt-engineering.lesso.title: Prompt Engineering
roadmap.day-003-prompt-engineering.lesso.description: Learn what prompt engineering is, why prompts are one of the most important components of AI applications, and how to write prompts that are reusable, maintainable and production-ready.

roadmap.day-004-prompt-templates.lesson.title: Prompt Templates & PromptBuilder
roadmap.day-004-prompt-templates.lesson.description: Learn why production AI applications never hardcode prompts. Understand prompt templates, parameter substitution, PromptBuilder architecture, and prompt versioning.

roadmap.day-005-context-engineering.less.title: Context Engineering
roadmap.day-005-context-engineering.less.description: Learn why prompts alone are not enough for production AI applications. Understand Context Engineering, ContextBuilder, context assembly, conversation history, retrieved knowledge, and scalable AI architecture.

roadmap.day-006-streaming-fundamentals.l.title: Streaming Fundamentals
roadmap.day-006-streaming-fundamentals.l.description: Learn why modern AI applications stream responses instead of waiting for completion. Understand token streaming, perceived performance, streaming architecture, and how streaming improves user experience.

roadmap.day-007-production-streaming-arc.title: Production Streaming Architecture
roadmap.day-007-production-streaming-arc.description: Learn how modern AI applications implement streaming using Server-Sent Events (SSE), provider abstraction, ReadableStream, buffer management, async generators, AbortController, and production-grade UX patterns.

roadmap.day-008-ai-application-architect.title: AI Application Architecture
roadmap.day-008-ai-application-architect.description: Learn how PromptBuilder, ContextBuilder, AI Core, AI SDK, AI Backend, Provider Adapters, and React applications fit together into a scalable production architecture.

roadmap.day-009-building-ai-core.lesson.title: Building AI Core
roadmap.day-009-building-ai-core.lesson.description: Design and implement AI Core—the reusable heart of your AI platform. Learn its modules, responsibilities, extension points, and how it powers multiple AI applications.

roadmap.Day-010-Embedding.lesson.title: Embeddings & Semantic Search
roadmap.Day-010-Embedding.lesson.description: Learn how modern AI systems retrieve information using semantic similarity instead of keyword matching. Understand embeddings, vector spaces, similarity search and their role in Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG).

handbook.streaming.provider-abstraction.title: Provider Abstraction for Streaming
handbook.streaming.provider-abstraction.description: Understanding provider abstraction in streaming, how to normalize different provider APIs, and build provider-independent streaming architectures.

handbook.streaming.readable-stream.title: ReadableStream and Stream Parsing
handbook.streaming.readable-stream.description: Understanding the browser's ReadableStream API, how to parse streaming data, handle buffers, and build robust frontend streaming implementations.

handbook.streaming.sse.title: Server-Sent Events (SSE)
handbook.streaming.sse.description: Understanding Server-Sent Events, how they enable streaming in AI applications, implementation patterns, and best practices for production streaming.

handbook.streaming.streaming-basics.title: Streaming Fundamentals
handbook.streaming.streaming-basics.description: Understanding token streaming, why it matters for AI applications, how it improves user experience, and the fundamentals of streaming architecture.

handbook.prompting.prompt-engineering.title: Prompt Engineering
handbook.prompting.prompt-engineering.description: Comprehensive guide to prompt engineering, including prompt anatomy, design principles, best practices, and treating prompts as production software artifacts.

handbook.prompting.prompt-templates.title: Prompt Templates
handbook.prompting.prompt-templates.description: Understanding prompt templates, variable substitution, template design patterns, and how to build reusable prompt systems for production AI applications.

handbook.prompting.role-prompting.title: Role Prompting
handbook.prompting.role-prompting.description: Understanding role prompting techniques, how assigning expertise to AI models improves response quality, and best practices for role-based prompt design.

handbook.llms.context-window.title: Context Window
handbook.llms.context-window.description: Understanding context windows, their impact on AI applications, strategies for context management, and how to work within model limitations.

handbook.llms.llm-basics.title: Large Language Model Fundamentals
handbook.llms.llm-basics.description: Understanding what Large Language Models are, how they work at a high level, and their role in modern AI applications.

handbook.llms.provider-comparison.title: AI Provider Comparison
handbook.llms.provider-comparison.description: Comprehensive comparison of major AI providers including Anthropic, OpenAI, Ollama, and Google, covering strengths, weaknesses, pricing, and use cases.

handbook.llms.tokens.title: Understanding Tokens
handbook.llms.tokens.description: Comprehensive guide to tokens, tokenization, token counting, and how tokens affect LLM interactions, costs, and context limits.

handbook.fundamentals.ai-engineering-phi.title: AI Engineering Philosophy
handbook.fundamentals.ai-engineering-phi.description: Understanding the role of an AI Engineer, how it differs from traditional software engineering and machine learning engineering, and the mindset required for production AI systems.

handbook.fundamentals.local-ai.title: Local AI Development
handbook.fundamentals.local-ai.description: Setting up and using local AI tools like Ollama for cost-effective experimentation, offline development, and learning AI concepts without API costs.

handbook.context.context-builder.title: ContextBuilder Architecture
handbook.context.context-builder.description: Understanding ContextBuilder architecture, responsibilities, implementation patterns, and how to build production-grade context assembly systems.

handbook.context.context-engineering.title: Context Engineering
handbook.context.context-engineering.description: Understanding context engineering, the difference between prompts and context, context assembly strategies, and why context quality often matters more than prompt quality.

glossary.glossary.title: AI Engineering Glossary
glossary.glossary.description: Comprehensive glossary of AI Engineering terms, concepts, and definitions used throughout the 100-day learning roadmap.
